title: Cowizz Weapons
description: This mod includes 4 new weapons, created for a Cowizz's video
body:
# Cowizz Weapons

This mod adds **4 new weapons completely overpowered**. It was created for a YouTube video and published here so fans can download it.

### New Items:
* MarteauDePasThor : A hammer which can blow blocks into the sky and deals up to 100 damage.
* Fusil d'assEAU : A watergun which can freeze every lava block that he shot (even in the nether)
* Baton D'Amour : A staff which deals up to 200 damage with the power of love.
* Sarbacane : A blowgun which freeze enemies for 2s.

## Other information:
* The only supported version of Minecraft is **1.20.1**.
* Make sure to download the **Fabric API Version 0.92.2+1.20.1** (it will not work without it)
